block.title: Block element
block.description: A block is an operational railway section used by the automatic route and train tracking system.
block.occupancyDescription: In DCCExpress the block is planned to work primarily with an occupancy sensor. The sensor reports whether the block is occupied or free.

name.title: Name
name.description: The user-visible block name shown on the layout and in route selection.

blockType.title: Block type
blockType.description: The operational role of the block.

length.title: Length
length.description: The estimated physical length of the block. This will later help automatic braking and stopping calculations.

sensorAddress.title: Occupancy sensor address
sensorAddress.description: The detector address that reports whether this block is occupied.

normal.title: Normal / Through block
normal.description: A regular line block, mainly used for passing through.

station.title: Station / Stop
station.description: A block where trains may perform a scheduled stop.

terminal.title: Terminal station
terminal.description: An end-point block where a train may later reverse direction or start a return journey.

staging.title: Staging / Hidden storage
staging.description: A storage or hidden yard block for trains entering or leaving the visible layout.

siding.title: Siding / Passing track
siding.description: A waiting, crossing, or passing block.

yard.title: Yard / Shunting area
yard.description: An operational block intended for yard or shunting movements.
